channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Neighbors outraged as LA airport becomes ground zero for AI-driven flying taxis
item.description: Archer Aviation has acquired Hawthorne Airport for $126M to launch an LA air taxi network ahead of the 2028 Olympics, featuring AI-powered eVTOL operations and next-gen aviation tech.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CIO Essential Insights: AI Priorities for IT Leaders
item.description: Join host John Gallant for a deep dive into Foundry’s 2025 AI Priorities research, including statistics on AI spending and budgeting, how best to put tools in the hands of employees, the big obstacles companies are facing with AI deployments as well as how best to expedite internal AI projects.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta enters power trading to support its AI energy needs
item.description: Meta Platforms Inc. is venturing into the complex world of electricity trading, betting it can accelerate the construction of new US power plants that are vital to its artificial intelligence ambitions.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: France will investigate Musk’s Grok chatbot after Holocaust denial claims
item.description: France's government is taking action against Elon Musk's AI chatbot, Grok, after it generated posts questioning the use of gas chambers at Auschwitz.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Adamson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Global cloud wars see AWS increasingly under threat from Microsoft and Google
item.description: AWS has long been the number one cloud provider, but its position may be slowly slipping as Microsoft guns for top spot.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Nestlé manages business processes with SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
item.description: With approximately 280,000 employees and sales of 91.4 billion Swiss francs (2024), Nestlé is one of the world’s largest food and beverage manufacturers. Well-known brands of the group include Maggi, the KitKat chocolate bar, and coffee specialties such as Nespresso and Nescafé.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What are TPUs? Your guide to tensor processing units and AI acceleration
item.description:
The gist TPUs are Google’s specialized ASICs built exclusively for accelerating tensor-heavy matrix multiplication used in deep learning models.
TPUs use vast parallelism and matrix multiply units (MXUs) to achieve significantly higher throughput and energy efficiency than GPUs for training.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: It’s actually happened – Android now works with Apple AirDrop for simple file-sharing, starting with the Pixel 10
item.description: Google has announced that Android's Quick Share now works with Apple's AirDrop for quick file-sharing, starting with the Pixel 10 –here's how it works.
item.dc:creator: Mark Wilson, TechRadar

item.title: Crypto’s path to legitimacy depends on the industry itself, not just politicians
item.description: President Trump recently promised to make America the “crypto capital of the world.” And his administration is working hard to make that pledge a reality. White House officials have established a working group on digital asset markets and directed federal agencies to craft a strategy to cement U.S.
item.dc:creator: Drew Johnson, Fast Company

item.title: Roblox bid for ad riches collides with wary sponsors, developers
item.description: Roblox Corp. executives have been trying to get advertisers to market their wares in the gaming platform’s virtual worlds since the company went public in 2021.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: How IT leaders can build successful AI strategies
item.description: The AI gold rush these days is littered with abandoned enterprise projects, with humans — not the technology itself — being blamed for high failure rates of AI projects. Recent data indicates that stagnant AI projects were often the result of poor vision, mismanagement, and a lack of resources.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: SAP touts Microsoft disaster recovery plan for Europe; Analysts doubt it will work
item.description: SAP has cut European deals with Microsoft, Capgemini, and Orange to ostensibly deliver an emergency disaster recovery failover if Microsoft is legally blocked from delivering European services.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: One Tech Tip: Do's and don'ts of using AI to help with schoolwork
item.description: The rise of ChatGPT and other AI systems has transformed education, changing how students learn and study.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan And Jocelyn Gecker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OPM’s HR modernization strategy sets next sight on USA Hire
item.description: The Office of Personnel Management is meeting with vendors after issuing a RFI to improve the USA Hire platform as it expects a surge in its use. The post OPM’s HR modernization strategy sets next sight on USA Hire first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft Fabric IQ adds ‘semantic intelligence’ layer to Fabric
item.description: With Fabric IQ, Microsoft is adding new semantic intelligence capabilities to its unified data and analytics platform, Fabric, that it says will help enterprises maintain a common data model and automate operational decisions.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google releases Gemini 3 with new reasoning and automation features
item.description: Google has launched Gemini 3 and integrated the new AI model into its search engine immediately, aiming to push advanced AI features into consumer and enterprise products faster as competition in the AI market intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft fixes Windows 10 update flaw
item.description: It didn’t take long for some IT leaders who last month started paying to get Windows 10 security updates to face their first support problem.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How AI is making IVF more predictable
item.description: Gaia Family offers fixed upfront pricing for IVF cycles with unlimited embryo transfers and financial protection, partnering with over 100 U.S. fertility clinics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
